testcase.name: test_platform_admin_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter157_products_module.py:72: in test_platform_admin_login assert res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter157_products_module.py:80: in test_partner_admin_login assert res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Invalid partner code"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
